title: ADR-0076 A: difficulty-conditioned budgets — triage difficulty estimate drives build window / correction rounds / per-phase artifact-timeout multipliers
summary: Supersedes difficulty-conditioned-phase-budgets (2026-07-05). Plumbing exists: phase_artifact_timeout_s per-phase map (cycle-1057) + workflow correction limit + policy merge conventions. ADD: (1) triage-decision.json carries difficulty (S|M|L|XL) per committed card (agent-estimated, schema field); (2) policy failure/workflow block gains difficulty multipliers map (compiled defaults S=1.0 M=1.25 L=1.5 XL=2.0, positive-override merge); (3) the cycle plan applies the multiplier to build artifact timeout + correction rounds. Evidence: batch-8's structural items got ~10-min build windows incl. corrections — the verification tail starves on L/XL items (ADR-0076 context).
acceptance: RED: difficulty parsed from triage-decision; absent → M default
RED: multipliers resolve from policy with compiled defaults; explicit override merges positively
RED: build launch spec + correction limit reflect the multiplier for an L item; S item byte-identical to today
go test -race; wiring proof on the composed launch path; apicover clean
